adjacency: radial edge to (sector,ring-1,position) when ring >= 2 and position <= ring-2
diagonal edge to (sector,ring-1,position-1) when ring >= 2 and position >= 1
corner-cross edge to (sector+1,ring-1,0) when ring >= 2 and position == ring-1
complete graph K5 over the five ring-1 nodes
board.edgeOrder: iterate nodes in node-id order; attempt cycle, radial, diagonal, corner-cross edges in that order; then ring-1 K5 pairs in lexicographic arm order; keep first undirected insertion
board.csrOrder: neighbors retain undirected edge insertion order
board.labels: sector character + ring character (ring 10 is 0) + decimal position

scoring.star: a same-color connected group is alive iff it directly occupies at least two perimeter nodes
scoring.territory: after dead groups are removed, a maximal non-alive region belongs to a player iff every adjacent alive star has that color and at least one alive star is adjacent
scoring.peries: owned perimeter nodes, whether occupied by an alive star or territory
scoring.quarkPeri: one point when a player owns at least three quarks
scoring.leader: higher total, then higher quark count, otherwise tie
scoring.terminalValue: from terminal toMove perspective: winner 1, loser -1; a terminal tie is invalid

game.legalActionOrder: legal placements by ascending node id
game.fullBoardResidual: the final placement decrements movesLeft and terminates before endTurn; actor and turnCount are retained; movesLeft is 0 or 1; midTurn is movesLeft > 0; lastMove is the final node; currentTurnMoves retains the final partial turn
game.placement: only an empty in-range node is legal
game.replay: apply the ordered action log to a fresh initial state
game.pairEquivalence: the two placements AB and BA in one complete nonterminal turn have the same semantic state; lastMove is presentation metadata

symmetry.rotation: r(k): t -> t + k*ring for k in 0..4
symmetry.reflection: f(k): t -> k*ring - t for k in 0..4
symmetry.action: place transforms by the node map
